allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k,v\) for k,v in {**d.get\('dependencies',{}\), **d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}.items\(\)]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d.get\('exports', {}\).get\('./legacy', 'NOT FOUND'\), indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in d.items\(\) if k in ['main','module','exports','files']}, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=sys.stdin.read\(\); print\(d[:300] if not d.strip\(\).startswith\('<'\) else 'STILL HTML'\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**p.get\('dependencies',{}\), **p.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; [print\(k,v\) for k,v in deps.items\(\) if any\(x in k for x in ['playwright','puppeteer','selenium','cheerio','axios']\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'count: {len\(d\)}, ids: {[x[\\"id\\"] for x in d[:3]]}'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; [print\(x['name'], '|', x['image_url']\) for x in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d[0] if isinstance\(d,list\) else d, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\([x['name'] for x in d[:5]] if isinstance\(d,list\) else d.get\('message',''\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\([x['name'] for x in d] if isinstance\(d,list\) else d\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\([x['name'] for x in d] if isinstance\(d,list\) else 'not a dir'\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('name:', d.get\('translations',[{}]\)[0].get\('name',''\)\); print\('images:', [i.get\('image'\) for i in d.get\('images',[]\)][:2]\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); t=[x for x in d.get\('translations',[]\) if x.get\('language'\)==2]; print\('name:', t[0]['name'] if t else ''\); print\('images:', [i.get\('image'\) for i in d.get\('images',[]\)][:3]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(x.get\('image'\)\) for x in d.get\('results',[]\)]")
